mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS event_log ( id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, event_id VARCHAR(36) NOT NULL, session_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, user_id INT NOT NULL, event_type VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL, event_status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, failure_reason VARCHAR(50) NULL, http_status INT NOT NULL, endpoint VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, device_type VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL, country VARCHAR(2) NOT NULL, course_id INT NOT NULL, price DECIMAL(12, 2) NULL, latency_ms INT NOT NULL, created_at DATETIME NOT NULL, UNIQUE KEY uk_event_log_event_id (event_id), INDEX idx_event_log_created_at (created_at), INDEX idx_event_log_event_type (event_type), INDEX idx_event_log_event_status (event_status), INDEX idx_event_log_session_event (session_id, event_type) )
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO event_log ( event_id, session_id, user_id, event_type, event_status, failure_reason, http_status, endpoint, device_type, country, course_id, price, latency_ms, created_at ) VALUES
( #{eventLog.eventId}, #{eventLog.sessionId}, #{eventLog.userId}, #{eventLog.eventType}, #{eventLog.eventStatus}, #{eventLog.failureReason}, #{eventLog.httpStatus}, #{eventLog.endpoint}, #{eventLog.deviceType}, #{eventLog.country}, #{eventLog.courseId}, #{eventLog.price}, #{eventLog.latencyMs}, #{eventLog.createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT event_type AS eventType, COUNT(*) AS eventCount FROM event_log GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY eventCount DESC
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00') AS eventHour, COUNT(*) AS eventCount FROM event_log GROUP BY eventHour ORDER BY eventHour

WITH session_steps AS ( SELECT session_id, MAX(CASE WHEN event_type = 'course_view' AND event_status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_course_view, MAX(CASE WHEN event_type = 'course_enroll' AND event_status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_course_enroll, MAX(CASE WHEN event_type = 'lesson_start' AND event_status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_lesson_start, MAX(CASE WHEN event_type = 'lesson_complete' AND event_status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_lesson_complete FROM event_log GROUP BY session_id ) SELECT step_name AS stepName, session_count AS sessionCount, conversion_rate AS conversionRate FROM ( SELECT 1 AS step_order, 'course_view' AS step_name, COALESCE(SUM(has_course_view), 0) AS session_count, 100.0 AS conversion_rate FROM session_steps UNION ALL SELECT 2 AS step_order, 'course_enroll' AS step_name, COALESCE(SUM(has_course_enroll), 0) AS session_count, COALESCE(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(has_course_enroll), 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(has_course_view), 0), 0) * 100, 2), 0) AS conversion_rate FROM session_steps UNION ALL SELECT 3 AS step_order, 'lesson_start' AS step_name, COALESCE(SUM(has_lesson_start), 0) AS session_count, COALESCE(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(has_lesson_start), 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(has_course_view), 0), 0) * 100, 2), 0) AS conversion_rate FROM session_steps UNION ALL SELECT 4 AS step_order, 'lesson_complete' AS step_name, COALESCE(SUM(has_lesson_complete), 0) AS session_count, COALESCE(ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(has_lesson_complete), 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(has_course_view), 0), 0) * 100, 2), 0) AS conversion_rate FROM session_steps ) funnel ORDER BY step_order
SELECT user_id AS userId, COUNT(*) AS eventCount FROM event_log GROUP BY user_id ORDER BY eventCount DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT event_type AS eventType, SUM(CASE WHEN event_status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successCount, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN event_status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS successRate FROM event_log GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY successRate DESC
SELECT event_status AS eventStatus, COUNT(*) AS failureCount FROM event_log WHERE event_status IN ('business_failure', 'system_failure') GROUP BY event_status ORDER BY failureCount DESC
SELECT failure_reason AS failureReason, COUNT(*) AS failureCount FROM event_log WHERE failure_reason IS NOT NULL GROUP BY failure_reason ORDER BY failureCount DESC

SELECT endpoint, COUNT(*) AS eventCount, SUM(CASE WHEN event_status != 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failureCount, ROUND(AVG(latency_ms), 2) AS averageLatencyMs FROM event_log GROUP BY endpoint ORDER BY averageLatencyMs DESC

SELECT course_id AS courseId, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'course_enroll' AND event_status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successfulEnrollments, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'lesson_complete' AND event_status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completedLessons, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'question_create' AND event_status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS questionCreates, COALESCE( ROUND( SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'lesson_complete' AND event_status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'course_enroll' AND event_status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100, 2 ), 0 ) AS completionRate FROM event_log GROUP BY course_id HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'course_enroll' AND event_status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 ORDER BY successfulEnrollments DESC, completionRate DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT 'duplicate event_id count' AS checkName, COUNT(*) AS issueCount FROM ( SELECT event_id FROM event_log GROUP BY event_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ) duplicate_event_ids UNION ALL SELECT 'invalid event_type count' AS checkName, COUNT(*) AS issueCount FROM event_log WHERE event_type NOT IN ('course_view', 'course_enroll', 'lesson_start', 'lesson_complete', 'question_create') UNION ALL SELECT 'course_enroll with null price count' AS checkName, COUNT(*) AS issueCount FROM event_log WHERE event_type = 'course_enroll' AND price IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'failure without reason count' AS checkName, COUNT(*) AS issueCount FROM event_log WHERE event_status != 'success' AND failure_reason IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'success with failure_reason count' AS checkName, COUNT(*) AS issueCount FROM event_log WHERE event_status = 'success' AND failure_reason IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'success with non-200 http_status count' AS checkName, COUNT(*) AS issueCount FROM event_log WHERE event_status = 'success' AND http_status != 200 UNION ALL SELECT 'lesson_start without successful enrollment session count' AS checkName, COUNT(*) AS issueCount FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT lesson_start.session_id FROM event_log lesson_start LEFT JOIN event_log course_enroll ON lesson_start.session_id = course_enroll.session_id AND course_enroll.event_type = 'course_enroll' AND course_enroll.event_status = 'success' WHERE lesson_start.event_type = 'lesson_start' AND lesson_start.event_status = 'success' AND course_enroll.session_id IS NULL ) invalid_lesson_start_sessions UNION ALL SELECT 'lesson_complete without successful lesson_start session count' AS checkName, COUNT(*) AS issueCount FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT lesson_complete.session_id FROM event_log lesson_complete LEFT JOIN event_log lesson_start ON lesson_complete.session_id = lesson_start.session_id AND lesson_start.event_type = 'lesson_start' AND lesson_start.event_status = 'success' WHERE lesson_complete.event_type = 'lesson_complete' AND lesson_complete.event_status = 'success' AND lesson_start.session_id IS NULL ) invalid_lesson_complete_sessions

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalEvents, COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS totalSessions, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'course_enroll' AND event_status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS successfulEnrollments, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'lesson_complete' AND event_status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completedLessons, SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'question_create' AND event_status = 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS questionCreateCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN event_type = 'course_enroll' AND event_status = 'success' THEN price ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalRevenue, SUM(CASE WHEN event_status = 'business_failure' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS businessFailureCount, SUM(CASE WHEN event_status = 'system_failure' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS systemFailureCount, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN event_status != 'success' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS failureRate, ROUND(AVG(latency_ms), 2) AS averageLatencyMs, ( SELECT failure_reason FROM event_log WHERE failure_reason IS NOT NULL GROUP BY failure_reason ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS topFailureReason FROM event_log
